system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son3_tongkhoiluong","body":"CREATE   PROC [dbo].[TR_DINHMUC_SON3_TONGKHOILUONG]
(
	@donhang nvarchar(max), 
	@uv int = 0
)
AS
--DECLARE @donhang nvarchar(max) = 'RAY-31300, RAY-31301, RAY-31302'
DECLARE @TB_DONHANG TABLE
(
	masp nvarchar(200),
	mausac nvarchar(50),
	soluong_donhang int
)
DECLARE @TB_TONGKHOILUONG TABLE
(
	mausac nvarchar(50),
	mact nvarchar(200),
	soluong float,
	khoiluong float,
	matson nvarchar(50)
)
-- INSERT ĐƠN HÀNG VÀO TABLE TẠM
INSERT INTO @TB_DONHANG(masp, mausac, soluong_donhang)
SELECT A.item_number, b.mausac, SUM(A.order_qty) AS order_qty
FROM tr_order_detail A
	INNER JOIN tr_sanpham B ON A.item_number = B.masp
WHERE order_number IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM dbo.fn_Split(@donhang, ','))
	AND A.f_cancelled = 'N' AND ISNULL(A.khongtinhson, 0) = 0
GROUP BY A.item_number, B.mausac


-- CHẠY CURSOR DUYỆT QUA CÁC SẢN PHẨM
DECLARE @masp nvarchar(200)
DECLARE @mausac nvarchar(50)
DECLARE @soluong_donhang INT

DECLARE CUR CURSOR LOCAL FOR
	SELECT masp, mausac, soluong_donhang FROM @TB_DONHANG
OPEN CUR
FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @masp, @mausac, @soluong_donhang
WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
BEGIN
	INSERT INTO @TB_TONGKHOILUONG(mausac, mact, soluong, khoiluong, matson)
	SELECT @mausac, A.mact, soluong * @soluong_donhang, khoiluong * @soluong_donhang, matson
	FROM (
	SELECT A.mact, 
		A.tenct, 
		A.soluong, B.metvuong,
		(A.soluong * ISNULL(B.metvuong, 0)) AS khoiluong, 
		A.matson
	FROM tr_dinhmuc_son3 A
		LEFT JOIN tr_dinhmuc_son3_metvuong B ON A.masp = B.masp AND A.matson = B.matson
	WHERE A.masp = @masp AND A.makhuvuc = 'SON'
		AND CASE WHEN COALESCE(A.tinhtrang_uv, '') = '' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END = @uv
	) A
	
	FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @masp, @mausac, @soluong_donhang
END
CLOSE CUR
DEALLOCATE CUR


SELECT A.mausac, A.mact, B.mota, B.dvt,
	KHOILUONGTONG = SUM(A.khoiluong),
	KL_MAT_A = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_A' THEN A.khoiluong END),
	KL_MAT_B = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_B' THEN A.khoiluong END),
	KL_MAT_C = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_C' THEN A.khoiluong END),
	KL_MAT_D = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_D' THEN A.khoiluong END),
	KL_MAT_E = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_E' THEN A.khoiluong END),
	KL_MAT_F = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_F' THEN A.khoiluong END),
	KL_MAT_G = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_G' THEN A.khoiluong END),
	KL_MAT_H = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_H' THEN A.khoiluong END),
	KL_MAT_I = SUM(CASE WHEN A.matson = 'MAT_I' THEN A.khoiluong END)
FROM @TB_TONGKHOILUONG A
	INNER JOIN tr_material B ON A.mact = B.mavt
WHERE A.khoiluong > 0
GROUP BY A.mausac, A.mact, B.mota, B.dvt
","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.cur","dbo.fn_split","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son3","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son3_metvuong","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-cursor","has-while","has-group-by"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
